findings.description: Concrete usage code examples for both testCharsetAndLength() and testSingleValidation() are omitted. The source shows the full test method pattern including the ENTITY_CLASS static constant definition (`private static final Class<SystemAccountEntity> ENTITY_CLASS = SystemAccountEntity.class;`) and how sheetName/id arguments are passed. These examples show the naming convention (e.g., sheetName = "testCharsetAndLength", id = "charsetAndLength").
findings.source_evidence: Source テストメソッドの作成方法 sections contain two @Test method implementations showing the complete call pattern with ENTITY_CLASS constant and string arguments for sheetName and id.

findings.description: The RST internal cross-reference `:ref:`special_notation_in_cell`` is preserved as raw RST markup without resolution. The actual special notation for cell values (techniques for efficiently creating input values) is not available in the knowledge file. An AI cannot resolve or explain this reference.
findings.source_evidence: Source footnote: `special_notation_in_cell の記法を使用することで、効率的に入力値を作成できる。` — this is a link to another section containing the actual notation syntax.

findings.description: Hint `testValidateCharsetAndLength` is missing from s6. The s6 section body explicitly mentions this method: 「単項目精査テスト（`testValidateCharsetAndLength` / `testSingleValidation`）では」.
findings.source_evidence: s6 content references testValidateCharsetAndLength directly in the バリデーションメソッドのテスト explanation.
